mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.title, t.content, t.sender_type, t.sender_id, t.sender_name, t.receiver_type, t.type, t.publish_time, t.is_deleted, t.create_time FROM ( SELECT nm.id AS id, nm.title AS title, SUBSTRING(nm.content, 1, 25) AS content, nm.sender_type AS sender_type, nm.sender_id AS sender_id, nm.sender_name AS sender_name, nm.receiver_type AS receiver_type, nm.type AS type, nm.publish_time AS publish_time, nm.is_deleted AS is_deleted, nm.create_time AS create_time, COALESCE(unm.is_read, 0) AS is_read FROM notify_message nm LEFT JOIN user_notify_message unm ON nm.id = unm.notify_id AND unm.user_id = #{userId} WHERE nm.is_deleted = 0 AND nm.receiver_type = 'ALL_USER' AND (unm.is_deleted IS NULL OR unm.is_deleted = 0) UNION ALL SELECT nm.id AS id, nm.title AS title, SUBSTRING(nm.content, 1, 25) AS content, nm.sender_type AS sender_type, nm.sender_id AS sender_id, nm.sender_name AS sender_name, nm.receiver_type AS receiver_type, nm.type AS type, nm.publish_time AS publish_time, nm.is_deleted AS is_deleted, nm.create_time AS create_time, unm.is_read AS is_read FROM user_notify_message unm INNER JOIN notify_message nm ON nm.id = unm.notify_id WHERE unm.user_id = #{userId} AND unm.is_deleted = 0 AND nm.is_deleted = 0 AND nm.receiver_type = 'DESIGNATED_USER' ) t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.title}, '%')
AND t.is_read = #{request.isRead}
ORDER BY t.publish_time DESC, t.id DESC
